name: Joshito Osuchukwu
comment: Being part of building this space was one of my favorite GSD memories. We need this permanently.

name: Julia Kim
comment: I ran into three people from completely different programs in one afternoon. That never happens anywhere else in Gund.

name: Kalana Brown
comment: The data proves what we all know intuitively — this space belongs to all GSD students, not just those in studio.

name: Xavaar Harandi
comment: We walked those trays for hours to understand how students actually use space here. The unstudio is the answer to what we found.

name: Malvika Singh
comment: We moved furniture across the building to make this happen. Worth every single trip.

name: Yanchen Li
comment: I came for one hour and stayed for four. The creative energy here is unlike anything else at GSD.

name: Gund Hall MDes Student
comment: I've never had a desk in Gund. The unstudio made me feel like I actually belong here.

name: GSD Community Member
comment: The informal conversations I had here led to a collaboration I couldn't have planned. This space works.

name: GSD Community Member
comment: I did my best model work this semester here, surrounded by people doing completely different things. There's something to that.

name: GSD Community Member
comment: Showed up not knowing anyone. Left with two new collaborators and a better thesis idea.
